text: I tried to make a payment but it just said 'not recognized'? What does that mean?

I tried to add some funds to my account, but it didn’t go through. I saw the message that the top-up failed, but I’m not sure why. Could it be because I entered the wrong card details? I had also just updated my app, so maybe that’s causing issues too?

I was at the ATM trying to withdraw cash when my card got stuck. I’ve been a customer for years and this is quite frustrating. Can you please guide me on how to retrieve it or if I need to request a new one?
I attempted to top up my account today, but it didn’t go through. Can you provide any insights on why this might have happened?
I see a pending transaction on my card, but I wasn’t expecting it. Can you check what it’s for?
Hi there! I recently checked my account and noticed a payment fee charged that I wasn't aware of. Can you help me understand why it was applied? It seems a bit high for what I expected. Thank you!
Hey, I tried to buy something online and my card got declined! Super frustrating, can you help figure out why? I didn't think I was over my limit or anything.
I just tried to buy groceries, and my card got declined. It's really frustrating because I thought I had enough balance. Can you help me figure out what went wrong?

Hey there! I just noticed that the amount I was charged in euros for my recent purchase was way more than what I expected. I thought the exchange rate would be better since I always check online before making payments. Can you help me figure out why this happened? I'm really confused about it, especially since my friend told me it should've been a better deal. Thanks a lot!
I've been trying to pay for groceries, but my card just won't work! I don't understand what's happening, and it's so frustrating! I need to resolve this ASAP.

Hey there! So I’ve been waiting for my new card to arrive for what feels like ages. I thought it'd be here by now, especially since I ordered it over two weeks ago. I’ve even checked with my neighbors to see if they’ve mistakenly received it. Any chance you could look into this for me? I’d really appreciate it, thanks!

Hi there! I recently used my card to make a purchase while traveling, and I noticed that the exchange rate applied was quite different from what I expected. I thought it would be closer to the official rate, but it seems much higher. Could you help me understand why that happened? Thanks!
Hey there, I've been waiting for my card payment to show up for days now! I really counted on that money being there. Can you check what's going on? It’s stressing me out.
I’m really frustrated! I didn’t expect to see a fee charged when I paid with my card. Why was there an extra charge on my transaction? It’s not what I signed up for!
Hello, I wanted to check on a payment that seems still pending. I’m not exactly sure why it hasn’t gone through yet. Could you help me figure this out?
Tried to buy something online but my card just got declined! What’s going on?
